What I offer

Services

  • ◎

    Logo design

    Unique, scalable logos built around your brand's personality and values.

  • ◈

    Brand identity

    Full visual systems: colours, typography, guidelines, and brand materials.

  • ◻

    Print design

    Business cards, brochures, packaging, and editorial layouts ready for print.

  • ◷

    Social media design

    Consistent, eye-catching templates for Instagram, Facebook, and beyond.

  • ◬

    Posters & banners

    Event artwork, outdoor advertising, and promotional materials that stand out.

  • ◌

    Illustration

    Custom characters, icons, and patterns tailored to your project's tone.

How I work

Process

01

Brief

We start with a conversation. I learn about your business, goals, audience, and preferences.

02

Concept

I research and sketch initial directions — exploring ideas before committing to one path.

03

Design

I refine the chosen concept, build out all assets, and present for your feedback.

04

Final files

Delivery of all source files and export-ready formats — print, web, and everything in between.
